name: vite-react-tailwind
description: Frontend SPA scaffold: Vite 5, React 18, TypeScript strict mode, Tailwind CSS v3, Vitest with @testing-library/react, ESLint flat config. Production-shape starting point for client-only apps that talk to an external API.
included: Vite 5 with the React plugin (HMR, esbuild)
Tailwind CSS v3 with PostCSS + Autoprefixer
selection_hints: Client-side UI talking to a separate backend API
Static site deployable to Netlify / Cloudflare Pages / S3
anti_hints: Server-side rendered or full-stack app needing route handlers
Backend / API service (use a backend template instead)
Database access from the same codebase
Python or non-TypeScript language explicitly requested
Realtime / WebSocket-first architecture (consider a different framework)

verification.description: Stages: lint (eslint .), typecheck (tsc --noEmit), smoke (vite build), test (vitest run), all (lint + typecheck + smoke + test). Exit 0 on stage=all means the SPA builds, types check, and tests pass.

primary_files: README.md — replace project description with what the brief actually builds
src/App.tsx — root component; replace the placeholder UI with your real screens
src/main.tsx — entry point; usually only edit to add Providers (Router, Query, etc.)
tailwind.config.js — extend the theme (colors, fonts) as the brief requires
package.json — update name + description; add deps as needed
src/App.test.tsx — replace with tests for your real components
preserve: vite.config.ts — Vite plugin wiring + path alias
tsconfig.json strict mode + path alias config
postcss.config.js — Tailwind needs this exact shape
src/index.css — Tailwind directives must come first
verify.sh stage routing — multi-stage contract the agentic Coder relies on
